title: Change colour of tags
excerpt: I notice that two of the colours of tags are not accessibility friendly but cannot work out how to change the colours without editing every individual tag. When I click settings in the tag column there are no options to …

posts.author: HStothard (Helen Stothard)
posts.cookedHtml: I notice that two of the colours of tags are not accessibility friendly but cannot work out how to change the colours without editing every individual tag. When I click settings in the tag column there are no options to change colours. I have to go to search everywhere view tags and then change individually. Is there a better, smarter way of doing this and wondering why Monday uses inaccessible colours in its set up?

posts.author: MaryJan (Mary Jennings)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, Monday doesn’t have a global setting to change tag colors. The fastest way is through Tag Management in the tag column settings, where you can edit tags in bulk.

For accessibility concerns, you can submit a feature request to Monday, as they’ve been updating these settings, but it may take time.
